resources.string: Always open the picker full screen by default. Can still be collapsed to the peek height.
The height of the picker in the collapsed state. Will always be limited to 80% of the current window size.
Limit the number of lines used to display the opened link. If disabled and the link is long, you might need to expand the list to see some browsers.
Leave the last used Browser Picker screen in Recents (useful for opening the same link in multiple browsers).
Customize test URL (used to try the app functionality and to retrieve a browser list in the customization screen)
It is used to try the app functionality and to retrieve a browser list in the customization screen, not when opening links.
Customize browser list and URL actions…
